values.content: Extract the type of dermatology service the patient wants. Common types: Consulta general, Limpieza facial, Tratamiento de acne, Revision de lunares, Botox, Peeling quimico. If the patient has not specified a service type, respond with exactly 'NEEDS_INPUT'. If they specified a service, respond with ONLY the service name, nothing else.

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: ={{ 'Perfecto, ' + $json.message.content.trim() + '. Que fecha y hora te gustaria? Por ejemplo: manana a las 10am o el jueves 17 de abril a las 3pm.' }}

assignments.name: new_context
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ booking_step: 'awaiting_datetime', service_type: $json.message.content.trim(), patient_name: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.patient_name }) }}

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: Que tipo de servicio te gustaria? Ofrecemos consulta general, limpieza facial, tratamiento de acne, revision de lunares, botox, peeling quimico, entre otros.

values.content: ={{ 'Extract the preferred appointment date and time from the patient message. Today is ' + $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') + '. Return ONLY a JSON object with this exact format: {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "time": "HH:mm"}. If you cannot extract a clear date and time, return exactly: {"error": "NEEDS_INPUT"}. No explanation, no markdown, just the JSON.' }}

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value:
={{ 'Tengo estos horarios disponibles:
1. ' + $json.slot_1 + ($json.slot_2 ? '
2. ' + $json.slot_2 : '') + ($json.slot_3 ? '
3. ' + $json.slot_3 : '') + '
Cual prefieres? (responde con el numero)' }}

assignments.name: new_context
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ booking_step: 'confirming_slot', service_type: $json.booking_context.service_type, available_slots: $json.available_slots, patient_name: $json.patient_name, patient_id: $json.patient_id }) }}

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: No hay horarios disponibles para esa fecha. Quieres intentar con otro dia? Por favor indicame la fecha y hora que prefieres.

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: No entendi la fecha. Puedes darme un dia y hora? Por ejemplo: el lunes a las 10am, o manana a las 3pm.

assignments.name: new_context
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ booking_step: 'awaiting_datetime', service_type: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.booking_context.service_type, patient_name: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.patient_name }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO appointments (patient_id, appointment_type, scheduled_at, google_event_id, duration_minutes, notes)
VALUES (
  CASE WHEN '{{ $('Parse Slot Selection').item.json.patient_id }}' = 'null' OR '{{ $('Parse Slot Selection').item.json.patient_id }}' = '' THEN NULL
       ELSE '{{ $('Parse Slot Selection').item.json.patient_id }}'::uuid END,
  '{{ $('Parse Slot Selection').item.json.service_type }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Slot Selection').item.json.selected_slot.start }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  30,
  'Agendada via chatbot'
) RETURNING id, scheduled_at, google_event_id

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: No entendi tu seleccion. Por favor responde con 1, 2 o 3 para elegir uno de los horarios disponibles.
